mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.email, m.nickname, m.my_team_code AS myTeamCode, m.manual_win_rate AS manualWinRate, m.updated_at AS updatedAt, t.name_kr AS myTeamName,
COUNT(d.diary_id) AS totalGames, SUM(CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) AND d.snapshot_team_code = g.winning_team THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS winGames, SUM(CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) AND g.winning_team IS NOT NULL AND g.winning_team != 'DRAW' AND d.snapshot_team_code != g.winning_team THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loseGames, SUM(CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) AND g.winning_team = 'DRAW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS drawGames
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t ON m.my_team_code = t.team_code JOIN game_attendances ga ON d.member_id = ga.member_id AND d.game_id = ga.game_id WHERE d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION') GROUP BY m.member_id, m.email, m.nickname, m.my_team_code, m.manual_win_rate, m.updated_at, t.name_kr HAVING totalGames > 0
ORDER BY totalGames ${sortDir}, IFNULL(m.manual_win_rate, (winGames / totalGames * 100)) DESC
ORDER BY winGames ${sortDir}, IFNULL(m.manual_win_rate, (winGames / totalGames * 100)) DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(m.manual_win_rate, (winGames / totalGames * 100)) ${sortDir}, totalGames DESC
ORDER BY IFNULL(m.manual_win_rate, (winGames / totalGames * 100)) DESC, totalGames DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id JOIN game_attendances ga ON d.member_id = ga.member_id AND d.game_id = ga.game_id WHERE d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM access_logs WHERE login_date = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM access_logs WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT IFNULL((SUM(CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) AND d.snapshot_team_code = g.winning_team THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.snapshot_team_code IN (g.home_team_code, g.away_team_code) AND g.winning_team IS NOT NULL AND g.winning_team != 'DRAW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)), 0) AS avgWinRate FROM diaries d INNER JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id JOIN game_attendances ga ON d.member_id = ga.member_id AND d.game_id = ga.game_id WHERE g.status = 'FINISHED' AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION')

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(d.diary_id) / NULLIF(#{mau}, 0), 0) AS avgMonthlyDiaries FROM diaries d INNER JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id WHERE d.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.status != 'CANCELLED'
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(login_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as logDate, COUNT(member_id) as cnt FROM access_logs WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY login_date ORDER BY login_date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUSPENDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as suspendedCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withdrawnCnt FROM members

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deletedCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'BLIND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as blindCnt FROM diaries
